CameraMovementStep1.title: Camera Movement
CameraMovementStep1.description:
Use {move_up}, {move_left}, {move_down}, {move_right} to move the camera. You can also [color=LIGHT_GREEN]click and drag[/color] with the {camera_scroll}.

Pressing {quick_scroll} allows you to move more quickly.

CameraMovementStep2.description: {scroll_up}, {scroll_down} will zoom the camera out and in.

CameraMovementStep3.description: Pressing {reset_camera} will centre the camera back on your ship.
